inputs.prompt: Type: Talent/contributor release. Project: Voices of the Valley — a feature documentary. Production company: Ridgeline Productions Ltd. Subject: Interviewees filmed over 6 months in their homes and workplaces. Distribution: Festival + streaming (global), broadcast (UK). Term: In perpetuity. Compensation: None.
Type: Location release. Project: short film called Threshold. Production company: Indie Films Co. Location: A privately owned bookshop. Distribution: Online and festivals.

Type: Talent release. Project: The Crossing — a documentary series for Arte. Production company: Berliner Dokumentarfilm GmbH. Subject: Contributors who are refugees sharing personal stories including sensitive personal history. Distribution: European broadcast + international streaming. Term: 10 years. Compensation: Travel expenses reimbursed. Broadcaster requirements: Arte contributor consent requirements apply.
